Records.description: One-loop four-point box with all four internal propagators of equal mass $m$ and three off-shell external legs (one leg massless). Used as the inner sub-loop in the calculation of the two-loop non-planar triangle. Its maximal cut at $d=4$ is obtained by solving the homogeneous differential equation and is given in closed algebraic form by Eq. (4.13): $\mathrm{Cut}(\mathrm{Box}) = c / \sqrt{(q_3^2 q_4^2 - t u)^2 + 4 m^2 [\ldots]}$, where $t$ and $u$ are kinematic invariants of the box.
Records.familyName: one-loop box with four massive propagators and three off-shell legs

Names: one-loop box with four massive propagators and three off-shell legs
